mingw-w64-runtime.description: MinGW-w64 Windows runtime headers, CRT, import libraries, and GCC runtime DLLs for building x86_64 Windows software.

native-sdk.description: Windows-native build SDK meta-package with pkgconf, Ninja, Make, CMake, Python, Meson, Git, and GCC.

pkgconf.description: pkgconf and pkg-config compatible metadata resolver for C and C++ library compile and link flags.

ninja.description: Ninja fast low-level build executor used by Meson, CMake, and native Windows build workflows.

cmake.description: CMake cross-platform build system generator for C, C++, Ninja, Make, and Visual Studio style projects.

python.description: Embeddable Python runtime for Windows build scripts, Meson, tooling, automation, and package helpers.

meson.description: Meson build system packaged for Windows-native builds with Ninja, Python, C, C++, GTK, and GNOME projects.

busybox-w32.description: BusyBox for Windows providing small Unix-like shell utilities such as sh, bash, cp, rm, sed, grep, and tar.

git.description: Git for Windows command line client for clone, fetch, checkout, commit, push, pull, and source control workflows.

make.description: GNU Make for Windows-native builds using Makefiles, configure scripts, Autotools, and compiler recipes.

binutils.description: GNU Binutils assembler, linker, archive, objdump, nm, strip, and binary utilities for Windows targets.

gmp.description: GNU Multiple Precision arithmetic library for big integers, rational numbers, compiler math, and cryptography.

mpfr.description: MPFR multiple-precision floating-point math library with correct rounding for GCC and numeric software.

mpc.description: MPC multiple-precision complex number library used by GCC and advanced numeric computation packages.

isl.description: Integer Set Library for polyhedral optimization, loop analysis, compiler optimization, and GCC graph scheduling.

zstd.description: Zstandard compression library for fast zstd compression, decompression, archives, and data storage.

gcc.description: GNU C and C++ compiler toolchain for Windows x86_64 with gcc, g++, libstdc++, headers, and runtime support.

vala.description: Vala compiler and libraries for building GObject, GLib, GTK, GIO, and introspection-friendly applications.

gtk4.description: GTK 4 graphical UI toolkit for Windows with widgets, GDK, GLib, GObject Introspection, Cairo, Pango, and GSK.

libgee.description: Libgee GObject collection library with lists, maps, sets, iterators, Vala support, and introspection data.

granite-7.description: Granite 7 GTK4 widget and application framework library from elementary OS with dialogs, settings widgets, overlays, toasts, date and time pickers, GLib, GObject, libgee, Vala, SQGI, and GObject Introspection support.

libsoup3.description: libsoup 3 HTTP client and server library for GLib and GIO with HTTP, HTTPS, cookies, proxies, brotli, SQLite, and HTTP/2.

gstreamer.description: GStreamer multimedia framework core for audio, video, streaming, pipelines, elements, pads, plugins, and introspection.

gst-plugins-base.description: GStreamer base plugins for audio, video, playback, typefinding, appsrc/appsink, raw parsing, Pango text, TCP, and test sources.

gst-plugins-good.description: GStreamer good plugins for common media formats and protocols including JPEG, PNG, Matroska, MP4, AVI, FLV, RTP, RTSP, UDP, Soup, and WAV.

directxmath.description: DirectXMath header-only SIMD vector, matrix, quaternion, and graphics math library for Direct3D and Windows games.

gst-plugins-bad.description: GStreamer bad plugins with extra media features including Direct3D 11, WASAPI, WebP, MPEG-TS, MXF, AIFF, video filters, screen capture, and Windows sinks.

gst-plugins-ugly.description: GStreamer ugly plugins for additional demuxers and decoders including ASF, DVD LPCM, DVD subtitles, and RealMedia.

gdal.description: GDAL geospatial raster and vector GIS library with OGR, SQLite, GeoPackage, RasterLite, GeoTIFF, PNG, JPEG, TIFF, NITF, GML, GPX, CSV, and PROJ coordinate transforms.

webkitgtk.description: WebKitGTK browser engine for GTK applications with HTML, CSS, JavaScriptCore, DOM, web views, HTTP, and rendering support.

icu.description: ICU Unicode and internationalization library for collation, normalization, locales, calendars, character sets, and text processing.

libxml2.description: libxml2 XML parser library for XML, HTML-ish parsing, XPath, schemas, catalogs, and structured document processing.

libgpg-error.description: Libgpg-error shared error code library used by GnuPG, libgcrypt, crypto, TLS, and security packages.

libgcrypt.description: Libgcrypt cryptography library with symmetric ciphers, hashes, MACs, public-key primitives, random numbers, and GnuPG support.

libtasn1.description: libtasn1 ASN.1 and DER parser library for X.509, certificates, TLS, PKI, and cryptographic data structures.

webp.description: WebP image codec tools and libraries for lossy, lossless, alpha, animation, JPEG/PNG conversion, and web images.

glib.description: GLib, GObject, GIO, GModule, threading, event loop, signals, properties, collections, and Windows utility runtime for GTK apps.

libgirepository-1.0.description: GObject Introspection repository runtime library for loading typelibs and dynamic language bindings such as SQGI, Python, and Vala tools.

gobject-introspection.description: GObject Introspection build support with scanner metadata, gdump helpers, GIR files, typelibs, and language binding infrastructure.

glib-introspection.description: GLib and GObject GIR and typelib data for dynamic imports of GLib, GObject, GIO, and GModule from SQGI and other bindings.

win32-introspection.description: Win32 GIR and typelib metadata for Windows API constants and types used by GObject Introspection imports.

sqgi.description: SQGI Squirrel interpreter with GObject Introspection imports for GLib, GTK, GIO, GSerial, and dynamic native bindings.

gserial.description: GSerial GObject serial port library with GLib, GTK, SQGI, Vala, COM port, UART, RS-232, and introspection support.

gautogui.description: GAutogui GObject GUI automation and input monitoring library for mouse movement, clicks, scroll, keyboard events, text typing, global hooks, Win32 SendInput, GLib, GTK, SQGI, Vala, and introspection bindings.

gjoystick.description: GJoystick GObject joystick and gamepad input library for XInput controllers, WinMM legacy joysticks, buttons, axes, GLib, GTK, SQGI, Vala, and introspection bindings.

gautostart.description: GAutostart GObject current-user autostart library for Windows Run registry entries, login startup, XDG autostart desktop files, GLib, GTK, SQGI, Vala, and introspection bindings.

libffi.description: libffi foreign function interface library for calling native C functions dynamically from runtimes, bindings, JITs, and interpreters.

pcre2.description: PCRE2 Perl-compatible regular expression library for pattern matching, regex, UTF, Unicode, and text parsing.

zlib.description: zlib compression library for DEFLATE, gzip-compatible streams, PNG, ZIP, HTTP compression, and general data compression.

libpng.description: libpng PNG image library for reading and writing PNG graphics with zlib compression, alpha, palette, and metadata.

brotli.description: Brotli compression library for HTTP content encoding, web assets, fonts, WOFF2-style compression, and data compression.

nghttp2.description: nghttp2 HTTP/2 library for HTTP/2 framing, HPACK header compression, network clients, and curl/libsoup support.

sqlite.description: SQLite embedded SQL database library with sqlite3, RTree spatial indexes, column metadata, local storage, and application databases.

libpsl.description: Public Suffix List library for cookie domains, registrable domains, TLD rules, HTTP clients, curl, and libsoup.

proj.description: PROJ cartographic projection and coordinate transform library for GIS, geospatial data, CRS, EPSG, SQLite, and GeoTIFF workflows.

jpeg.description: libjpeg-turbo JPEG image codec library for fast JPEG encode, decode, JFIF, EXIF, thumbnails, and graphics pipelines.

tiff.description: libtiff TIFF and GeoTIFF image library for raster images, tags, metadata, JPEG/zlib compression, and GIS formats.

freetype.description: FreeType font rendering library for TrueType, OpenType, glyph rasterization, text shaping inputs, and UI typography.

fontconfig.description: Fontconfig font discovery, matching, fallback, cache, family selection, and configuration library for text rendering.

pixman.description: Pixman pixel manipulation library for image compositing, raster operations, Cairo rendering, alpha blending, and 2D graphics.

cairo.description: Cairo 2D vector graphics library for drawing, paths, text, PNG surfaces, PDF-style rendering, and GTK graphics.

graphene.description: Graphene geometry math library for vectors, matrices, points, rectangles, quaternions, GObject Introspection, and GTK scene graphs.

harfbuzz.description: HarfBuzz text shaping engine for OpenType, Unicode, complex scripts, glyph layout, font shaping, GTK, Pango, and ICU.

pango.description: Pango text layout and internationalized typography library for GTK with HarfBuzz, FreeType, Fontconfig, Cairo, BiDi, and markup.

gdk-pixbuf.description: GDK Pixbuf image loading and pixel buffer library for GTK with PNG, JPEG, icons, thumbnails, and GObject Introspection.

libepoxy.description: libepoxy OpenGL, EGL, WGL, and GL extension loader library for GTK, graphics contexts, and GPU rendering.

gettext.description: GNU gettext internationalization runtime for translations, message catalogs, localization, ngettext, and libintl.

expat.description: Expat streaming XML parser library for SAX-style parsing, configuration files, metadata, SVG-ish XML, and structured data.

fribidi.description: FriBidi Unicode bidirectional text library for right-to-left scripts, Arabic, Hebrew, text layout, and Pango.

openssl.description: OpenSSL TLS and cryptography library for HTTPS, SSL, certificates, X.509, hashes, ciphers, random numbers, and secure networking.

curl.description: libcurl URL transfer library for HTTP, HTTPS, TLS, HTTP/2, downloads, REST APIs, proxies, cookies, brotli, zstd, and OpenSSL.

minizip.description: MiniZip ZIP archive library for zip files, unzip, compression, packaging, installers, and zlib-based archives.

xz.description: liblzma XZ compression library for .xz, LZMA streams, archive compression, package data, and decompression.

bzip2.description: bzip2 compression library and tool for .bz2 archives, block compression, decompression, and source packages.

libwebp.description: libwebp development library for WebP image encoding, decoding, alpha, animation, lossless compression, and graphics apps.

opus.description: Opus audio codec library for speech, music, VoIP, streaming, low-latency audio, and game voice chat.

libsndfile.description: libsndfile audio file library for WAV, AIFF, AU, raw audio, sound metadata, Opus support, and SQLite-backed format data.

eigen3.description: Eigen3 header-only C++ template library for linear algebra, matrices, vectors, geometry, transforms, and numerical algorithms.

geos.description: GEOS computational geometry library for GIS, spatial predicates, overlays, buffers, topology, WKT/WKB, and shapely-style operations.

pugixml.description: pugixml fast lightweight C++ XML DOM parser and writer for configuration files, documents, XPath, and structured data.

rapidjson.description: RapidJSON header-only C++ JSON parser and writer for DOM, SAX, serialization, configuration, and web API data.

openblas.description: OpenBLAS CBLAS linear algebra library for BLAS routines, matrices, vectors, numeric computing, machine learning, and scientific code.

stb.description: stb single-file public domain C headers for image loading, image writing, TrueType fonts, Vorbis audio, rectangles, and utilities.

utfcpp.description: utfcpp header-only C++ UTF-8 library for Unicode conversion, validation, iterators, code points, and text handling.

assimp.description: Assimp 3D asset import library for meshes, scenes, materials, animations, models, OBJ, FBX, glTF, Collada, STL, and game engines.

openal-soft.description: OpenAL Soft cross-platform 3D audio library for positional sound, game audio, spatial effects, and low-level audio playback.

SDL2.description: SDL2 cross-platform game and multimedia library for windows, events, input, keyboard, mouse, joystick, audio, rendering, and OpenGL.

SDL2_image.description: SDL2_image image loading extension for SDL2 with PNG, JPEG, TIFF, WebP, textures, sprites, and game assets.

SDL2_mixer.description: SDL2_mixer audio mixing extension for SDL2 with WAV playback, channels, music hooks, sound effects, and game audio.

SDL2_ttf.description: SDL2_ttf TrueType font rendering extension for SDL2 using FreeType and HarfBuzz for text, UI labels, and game typography.

glfw.description: GLFW window, input, and OpenGL context library for games, graphics tools, keyboard, mouse, monitors, and rendering demos.

box2d.description: Box2D 2D physics engine for games and simulations with rigid bodies, collisions, joints, shapes, and dynamics.

fftw3.description: FFTW3 fast Fourier transform library for FFT, signal processing, audio analysis, spectral transforms, and scientific computing.

gsl.description: GNU Scientific Library for numerical computing with statistics, random numbers, linear algebra, integration, interpolation, FFT, and special functions.

mingw-binutils.description: Ubuntu MinGW binutils package with Windows-targeted assembler, linker, objdump, strip, ar, ranlib, and import library tools.
